channel.title: Bloatware on xtrymind
channel.description: Recent content in Bloatware on xtrymind

item.title: Remove Bloatware on Sony Xperia M4Aqua
item.description: Sony ship Marshmallow firmware with a lot of bloatware (not as lot as samsung though), it’s eat space, memory and battery life even though we don’t use it. if you already root you can always remove them one by one with link2sd, titanium backup or root explorer, but it’s take a lot of time doing it one by one. i’m make flashable zip to remove some of sony marshmallow bloatware, not all bloatware i remove because i’m still using some of it like gmail etc.
